name: TG RAG — 1. Ingest + Daily Cleanup (dynamic config)

parameters.query:
SELECT key, value FROM tg_config
WHERE key IN ('fetch_limit', 'fetch_hours_back');

INSERT INTO tg_messages (
  msg_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_title,
  text,
  msg_date,
  embedding
)
VALUES (
  {{$json.msg_id}},
  {{$json.channel_id}},
  '{{$json.channel_title}}',
  '{{$json.text}}',
  NOW(),
  '{{$json.embedding}}'::vector
)
ON CONFLICT (msg_id, channel_id) DO UPDATE
SET
  embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding,
  channel_title = EXCLUDED.channel_title,
  text = EXCLUDED.text,
  msg_date = EXCLUDED.msg_date;
